pi_items.source: setup_task.sh logic manually generating exactly 4500 records
setup_task.sh logic explicitly defines species counts, calculates exactly 34 high-risk trees with DBH sum 980, and task instructions dictate $150 multiplier

privileged_info_summary: Verified that the dataset is completely synthetically generated via Python scripting in setup_task.sh, contradicting the claim that it is a subset of the actual NYC Street Tree Census. The script correctly generates exactly 4,500 tree records, including exactly 990 London planetrees (22.0%) and 630 Honeylocusts (14.0%). The data strictly guarantees exactly 34 high-risk trees that meet the target conditions, with a combined DBH of 980, mathematically proving the $147,000 grand total replacement cost based on the $150 multiplier.
